← Projects
2025

PaperPlay: Hand-drawn Sketches to Playable Games

HackMIT 2025 — 2nd Place Modal Prize. Turn hand-drawn sketches into playable physics games with real-time AI commentary.

Demo Video

Built system turning hand-drawn sketches into playable physics-based games using OpenCV, a physics engine, and real-time AI commentary. Won 2nd Place Modal Prize at HackMIT 2025.

Technologies & Topics

OpenCVPhysics EngineAIHackathon
Zehua Wang

Sophomore @ MIT
I think about AI the way a physicist would.
